# Alleycats

Service endpoints:
- https://alleycats.platphormnews.com/
- https://alleycats.platphormnews.com/api/health
- https://alleycats.platphormnews.com/.well-known/mcp.json
- https://alleycats.platphormnews.com/openapi.json
- https://alleycats.platphormnews.com/rss.xml
- https://alleycats.platphormnews.com/sitemap.xml
- https://alleycats.platphormnews.com/manifest.webmanifest
- https://alleycats.platphormnews.com/robots.txt
